basics.name: Caini PAN
basics.summary: Ph.D. Researcher in Medical Imaging at NeuroSpin, CEA Paris-Saclay. Working on high-resolution MRI acquisition, k-space trajectory optimization, and AI-driven image reconstruction.

work.summary: High-resolution 4D acquisition strategy for 11.7 T fMRI. Optimizing 4D sampling strategies for ultra-high-field MR systems to achieve enhanced SNR and minimal artifacts.

Optimizing k-space trajectories for MRI reconstruction. Incorporated automatic differentiation via Jacobian approximation in MRI-NUFFT. Adapted PROJeCTOR framework using bi-level optimization for CS-MRI.
Knowledge distillation from multi-modal to mono-modal networks using self-generated data and a custom U-Net. Visualized saliency maps to identify decisive layers in knowledge transfer.
Classification on cardiac MRI images. Implemented U-Net for left ventricular segmentation and an MLP classifier for five cardiac disease categories.

work.company: MISA Lab, Xidian University & Fu Wai Hospital CAMS
work.summary: Segmentation of myocardial pathology histology slides using a novel CLAM-based approach for first-ever epicardium segmentation on pathological tissue slices.

education.institution: Télécom Paris, Institut Polytechnique de Paris
